ValidationRule.description: Requires QA approval before moving to SIT
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Ready for SIT"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "In SIT"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "SIT Approved"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Done") ), ISCHANGED(Status__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "QA Approved")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "Ready for SIT")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "In SIT")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), "SIT Approved")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Story must be QA Approved before moving to SIT phase.
